model.elementary.dbt_metrics.name: dbt_metrics
model.elementary.dbt_metrics.description: Metadata about metrics in the project, including configuration and properties from the dbt graph. Each row contains information about a single metric. Data is loaded every time this model is executed. It is recommended to execute the model every time a change is merged to the project.

model.elementary.dbt_tests.name: dbt_tests
model.elementary.dbt_tests.description: Metadata about tests in the project, including configuration and properties from the dbt graph. Each row contains information about a single test. Data is loaded every time this model is executed. It is recommended to execute the model every time a change is merged to the project.

model.elementary.dbt_snapshots.name: dbt_snapshots
model.elementary.dbt_snapshots.description: Metadata about snapshots in the project, including configuration and properties from the dbt graph. Each row contains information about a single snapshot. Data is loaded every time this model is executed. It is recommended to execute the model every time a change is merged to the project.

model.elementary.dbt_models.name: dbt_models
model.elementary.dbt_models.description: Metadata about models in the project, including configuration and properties from the dbt graph. Each row contains information about a single model. Data is loaded every time this model is executed. It is recommended to execute the model every time a change is merged to the project.

model.elementary.dbt_exposures.name: dbt_exposures
model.elementary.dbt_exposures.description: Metadata about exposures in the project, including configuration and properties from the dbt graph. Each row contains information about a single exposure. Data is loaded every time this model is executed. It is recommended to execute the model every time a change is merged to the project.

model.elementary.dbt_invocations.name: dbt_invocations
model.elementary.dbt_invocations.description: Attributes associated with each dbt invocation. Inserted at the end of each invocation.

model.elementary.dbt_run_results.name: dbt_run_results
model.elementary.dbt_run_results.description: Run results of dbt invocations, inserted at the end of each invocation. Each row is the invocation result of a single resource (model, test, snapshot, etc). New data is loaded to this model on an on-run-end hook named 'elementary.upload_run_results' from each invocation that produces a result object. This is an incremental model.

model.elementary.dbt_sources.name: dbt_sources
model.elementary.dbt_sources.description: Metadata about sources in the project, including configuration and properties from the dbt graph. Each row contains information about a single source. Data is loaded every time this model is executed. It is recommended to execute the model every time a change is merged to the project.

model.elementary.metrics_anomaly_score.name: metrics_anomaly_score
model.elementary.metrics_anomaly_score.description: This is a view on `data_monitoring_metrics` that runs the same query the anomaly detection tests run to calculate anomaly scores. The purpose of this view is to provide visibility to the results of anomaly detection tests.

model.elementary.anomaly_threshold_sensi.name: anomaly_threshold_sensitivity
model.elementary.anomaly_threshold_sensi.description: This is a view on `metrics_anomaly_score` that calculates if values of metrics from latest runs would have been considered anomalies in different anomaly scores. This can help you decide if there is a need to adjust the `anomaly_score_threshold`.

model.elementary.data_monitoring_metrics.name: data_monitoring_metrics
model.elementary.data_monitoring_metrics.description: Elementary anomaly detection tests monitor metrics such as volume, freshness and data quality metrics. This incremental table is used to store the metrics over time. On each anomaly detection test, the test queries this table for historical metrics, and compares to the latest values. The table is updated with new metrics on the on-run-end named handle_test_results that is executed at the end of dbt test invocations.

model.elementary.schema_columns_snapshot.name: schema_columns_snapshot
model.elementary.schema_columns_snapshot.description: Stores the schema details for tables that are monitored with elementary schema changes test. In order to compare current schema to previous state, we must store the previous state. The data is from a view that queries the data warehouse information schema. This is an incremental table.

model.elementary.monitors_runs.name: monitors_runs
model.elementary.monitors_runs.description: This is a view on `data_monitoring_metrics` that is used to determine when a specific anomaly detection test was last executed. Each anomaly detection test queries this view to decide on a start time for collecting metrics.

model.elementary.job_run_results.name: job_run_results
model.elementary.job_run_results.description: Run results of dbt invocations, enriched with jobs metadata. Each row is the result of a single job. This is a view on `dbt_invocations`.

model.elementary.model_run_results.name: model_run_results
model.elementary.model_run_results.description: Run results of dbt models, enriched with models metadata. Each row is the result of a single model. This is a view that joins data from `dbt_run_results` and `dbt_models`.

model.elementary.snapshot_run_results.name: snapshot_run_results
model.elementary.snapshot_run_results.description: Run results of dbt snapshots, enriched with snapshots metadata. Each row is the result of a single snapshot. This is a view that joins data from `dbt_run_results` and `dbt_snapshots`.

model.elementary.elementary_test_results.name: elementary_test_results
model.elementary.elementary_test_results.description: Run results of all dbt tests, with fields and metadata needed to produce the Elementary report UI. Each row is the result of a single test, including native dbt tests, packages tests and elementary tests. New data is loaded to this model on an on-run-end hook named `elementary.handle_tests_results`.

model.elementary.alerts_dbt_tests.name: alerts_dbt_tests
model.elementary.alerts_dbt_tests.description: A view that is used by the Elementary CLI to generate dbt tests alerts, including all the fields the alert will include such as owner, tags, error message, etc. This view includes data about all dbt tests except elementary tests. It filters alerts according to configuration.

model.elementary.alerts_schema_changes.name: alerts_schema_changes
model.elementary.alerts_schema_changes.description: A view that is used by the Elementary CLI to generate alerts on schema changes detected using elementary tests. The view filters alerts according to configuration.

model.elementary.alerts_dbt_models.name: alerts_dbt_models
model.elementary.alerts_dbt_models.description: A view that is used by the Elementary CLI to generate models alerts, including all the fields the alert will include such as owner, tags, error message, etc. It joins data about models and snapshots run results, and filters alerts according to configuration.

model.elementary.alerts_anomaly_detectio.name: alerts_anomaly_detection
model.elementary.alerts_anomaly_detectio.description: A view that is used by the Elementary CLI to generate alerts on data anomalies detected using the elementary anomaly detection tests. The view filters alerts according to configuration.

model.analytics.fct_dim_sleep.test_display_name: Not Null Fct Dim Sleep Person
model.analytics.fct_dim_sleep.test_query:
select person
from "analytics"."marts"."fct_dim_sleep"
